AgentLogs

Coding agents, visible to your team.
Open-source and self-hostable. Track sessions, share prompts, and link every conversation to the commit it produced.

Website · Docs · Discord · Changelog

---

AgentLogs captures and analyzes transcripts from AI coding agents (like Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Pi) to give your team visibility into how AI tools are used in their codebases. **See it in action →** [Example transcript](https://agentlogs.ai/s/ijz0z090jxrmmfjsz9lkcq7j) ## Why AgentLogs? AI coding agents are becoming core to how teams write software. But right now, every session is a black box stored on the machine of the user. You can't see the context put into each session and there is no knowledge sharing between teammates. AgentLogs fixes that: - **Team observability** — Dashboard with activity metrics, agent & model usage, and per-member breakdowns - **Git integration** — Links sessions to the commits they produced. See which transcript wrote which code - **Shared learning** — Browse and share your team's sessions to discover effective prompts and workflows | Team Dashboard | Git Integration | Session Browser | | --------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | ![Dashboard](https://agentlogs.ai/features/dashboard.png) | ![Git](https://agentlogs.ai/features/git.png) | ![List](https://agentlogs.ai/features/list.png) | ## Supported Agents | Agent | Transcripts | Auto-sync | Commit Tracking | | -------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- | --------- | --------------- | | [Claude Code](https://agentlogs.ai/docs/agents/claude-code) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | | [Codex](https://agentlogs.ai/docs/agents/codex) (experimental) | ✓ | ✓ | — | | [OpenCode](https://agentlogs.ai/docs/agents/opencode) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | | [Pi](https://agentlogs.ai/docs/agents/pi) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ## Quick Start (using AgentLogs Cloud) ### 1. Log in ```bash npx agentlogs login agentlogs.ai ``` ### 2. Install the plugin for your agent **Claude Code** — inside Claude Code: ``` /plugin marketplace add agentlogs/claude-code /plugin install agentlogs ``` **Codex:** ```bash codex mcp add agentlogs -- npx -y agentlogs mcp ``` **OpenCode** — add to `opencode.json`: ```json { "plugin": ["@agentlogs/opencode"] } ``` **Pi** — run inside Pi or from the terminal: ```bash pi install npm:@agentlogs/pi ``` ### 3. Use your agent as usual Transcripts are captured and uploaded automatically. View them at [agentlogs.ai](https://agentlogs.ai). ## CLI The CLI can also be used standalone for manual uploads: ```bash # Interactive picker, browse transcripts from all agents npx agentlogs upload # Upload most recent transcript npx agentlogs upload --latest # Sync all Claude Code transcripts npx agentlogs claudecode sync # Check auth status npx agentlogs status ``` See the full [CLI reference](https://agentlogs.ai/docs/cli/commands). ## Self-Hosting AgentLogs is fully open-source and can be self-hosted. ### Prerequisites - [Bun](https://bun.sh/) v1.3.0+ - GitHub OAuth App ([create one](https://github.com/settings/developers)) - Homepage: `http://localhost:8787` - Callback: `http://localhost:8787/api/auth/callback/github` ### Setup ```bash git clone https://github.com/agentlogs/agentlogs.git cd agentlogs bun install # Configure environment cp packages/server/.dev.vars.example packages/server/.dev.vars # Edit .dev.vars with your GitHub OAuth credentials and a secret: # GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=... # GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=... # BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=... (openssl rand -base64 32) # BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost:8787 # WEB_URL=http://localhost:8787 # Initialize database bun db:migrate # Start bun dev ``` Open http://localhost:8787 Point the CLI at your instance: ```bash npx agentlogs login localhost:8787 ``` ### Deploy to Cloudflare ```bash cd packages/server # Create D1 database wrangler d1 create agentlogs # Run remote migrations bun db:migrate:remote # Set secrets wrangler secret put GITHUB_CLIENT_ID wrangler secret put GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET wrangler secret put BETTER_AUTH_SECRET # Deploy bun run deploy ``` ## Project Structure ``` packages/ ├── cli/ — CLI tool (npx agentlogs) ├── web/ — Web app (TanStack Start + Cloudflare Workers + D1) ├── shared/ — Shared types, schemas, transcript parsing, secret redaction ├── pi/ — Pi extension (@agentlogs/pi) ├── opencode/ — OpenCode plugin (@agentlogs/opencode) └── e2e/ — End-to-end tests docs/ — Documentation (Mintlify) ``` ## Development ```bash # Start the web app bun dev # Run CLI bun agentlogs # Type check, lint, format bun run check # Format code bun run format # Run e2e tests bun run test:e2e # Database commands bun db:migrate # Run migrations bun db:generate # Generate migrations from schema changes bun db:studio # Open Drizzle Studio bun db:reset # Reset local database ``` ## Tech Stack - **Web**: [TanStack Start](https://tanstack.com/start) + [Cloudflare Workers](https://workers.cloudflare.com/) + [D1](https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/) (SQLite) - **ORM**: [Drizzle](https://orm.drizzle.team/) - **Auth**: [BetterAuth](https://better-auth.com/) (GitHub OAuth + device flow) - **Styling**: [Tailwind CSS v4](https://tailwindcss.com/) + [shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com/) - **CLI**: [Commander](https://github.com/tj/commander.js) - **Quality**: [oxlint](https://oxc.rs/) + [oxfmt](https://oxc.rs/) + [tsgo](https://github.com/nicolo-ribaudo/tsgo) ## Contributing We welcome contributions! Please: 1. Fork the repo and create a branch 2. Make your changes 3. Run `bun run format` and `bun run check` 4. Open a PR ## Acknowledgments AgentLogs was inspired by and builds on ideas from: - [Amp Threads](https://ampcode.com/) — team observability for AI coding agents - [Yaplog](https://yaplog.dev/), [Pi session sharing](https://pi.dev), [OpenCode session sharing](https://opencode.ai) — public sharing of AI coding sessions ## License [MIT](LICENSE) " + "text": "[read_file for 'README.md'] Result:

\n\n

\n \n

\n\nAgentLogs captures and analyzes transcripts from AI coding agents (like Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Pi) to give your team visibility into how AI tools are used in their codebases.\n\n**See it in action →** [Example transcript](https://agentlogs.ai/s/ijz0z090jxrmmfjsz9lkcq7j)\n\n## Why AgentLogs?\n\nAI coding agents are becoming core to how teams write software. But right now, every session is a black box stored on the machine of the user. You can't see the context put into each session and there is no knowledge sharing between teammates.\n\nAgentLogs fixes that:\n\n- **Team observability** — Dashboard with activity metrics, agent & model usage, and per-member breakdowns\n- **Git integration** — Links sessions to the commits they produced. See which transcript wrote which code\n- **Shared learning** — Browse and share your team's sessions to discover effective prompts and workflows\n\n| Team Dashboard | Git Integration | Session Browser |\n| --------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |\n| ![Dashboard](https://agentlogs.ai/features/dashboard.png) | ![Git](https://agentlogs.ai/features/git.png) | ![List](https://agentlogs.ai/features/list.png) |\n\n## Supported Agents\n\n| Agent | Transcripts | Auto-sync | Commit Tracking |\n| -------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- | --------- | --------------- |\n| [Claude Code](https://agentlogs.ai/docs/agents/claude-code) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |\n| [Codex](https://agentlogs.ai/docs/agents/codex) (experimental) | ✓ | ✓ | — |\n| [OpenCode](https://agentlogs.ai/docs/agents/opencode) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |\n| [Pi](https://agentlogs.ai/docs/agents/pi) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |\n\n## Quick Start (using AgentLogs Cloud)\n\n### 1. Log in\n\n```bash\nnpx agentlogs login agentlogs.ai\n```\n\n### 2. Install the plugin for your agent\n\n**Claude Code** — inside Claude Code:\n\n```\n/plugin marketplace add agentlogs/claude-code\n/plugin install agentlogs\n```\n\n**Codex:**\n\n```bash\ncodex mcp add agentlogs -- npx -y agentlogs mcp\n```\n\n**OpenCode** — add to `opencode.json`:\n\n```json\n{ \"plugin\": [\"@agentlogs/opencode\"] }\n```\n\n**Pi** — run inside Pi or from the terminal:\n\n```bash\npi install npm:@agentlogs/pi\n```\n\n### 3. Use your agent as usual\n\nTranscripts are captured and uploaded automatically. View them at [agentlogs.ai](https://agentlogs.ai).\n\n## CLI\n\nThe CLI can also be used standalone for manual uploads:\n\n```bash\n# Interactive picker, browse transcripts from all agents\nnpx agentlogs upload\n\n# Upload most recent transcript\nnpx agentlogs upload --latest\n\n# Sync all Claude Code transcripts\nnpx agentlogs claudecode sync\n\n# Check auth status\nnpx agentlogs status\n```\n\nSee the full [CLI reference](https://agentlogs.ai/docs/cli/commands).\n\n## Self-Hosting\n\nAgentLogs is fully open-source and can be self-hosted.\n\n### Prerequisites\n\n- [Bun](https://bun.sh/) v1.3.0+\n- GitHub OAuth App ([create one](https://github.com/settings/developers))\n - Homepage: `http://localhost:8787`\n - Callback: `http://localhost:8787/api/auth/callback/github`\n\n### Setup\n\n```bash\ngit clone https://github.com/agentlogs/agentlogs.git\ncd agentlogs\nbun install\n\n# Configure environment\ncp packages/server/.dev.vars.example packages/server/.dev.vars\n# Edit .dev.vars with your GitHub OAuth credentials and a secret:\n# GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=...\n# GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=...\n# BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=... (openssl rand -base64 32)\n# BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost:8787\n# WEB_URL=http://localhost:8787\n\n# Initialize database\nbun db:migrate\n\n# Start\nbun dev\n```\n\nOpen http://localhost:8787\n\nPoint the CLI at your instance:\n\n```bash\nnpx agentlogs login localhost:8787\n```\n\n### Deploy to Cloudflare\n\n```bash\ncd packages/server\n\n# Create D1 database\nwrangler d1 create agentlogs\n\n# Run remote migrations\nbun db:migrate:remote\n\n# Set secrets\nwrangler secret put GITHUB_CLIENT_ID\nwrangler secret put GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET\nwrangler secret put BETTER_AUTH_SECRET\n\n# Deploy\nbun run deploy\n```\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```\npackages/\n├── cli/ — CLI tool (npx agentlogs)\n├── web/ — Web app (TanStack Start + Cloudflare Workers + D1)\n├── shared/ — Shared types, schemas, transcript parsing, secret redaction\n├── pi/ — Pi extension (@agentlogs/pi)\n├── opencode/ — OpenCode plugin (@agentlogs/opencode)\n└── e2e/ — End-to-end tests\ndocs/ — Documentation (Mintlify)\n```\n\n## Development\n\n```bash\n# Start the web app\nbun dev\n\n# Run CLI\nbun agentlogs\n\n# Type check, lint, format\nbun run check\n\n# Format code\nbun run format\n\n# Run e2e tests\nbun run test:e2e\n\n# Database commands\nbun db:migrate # Run migrations\nbun db:generate # Generate migrations from schema changes\nbun db:studio # Open Drizzle Studio\nbun db:reset # Reset local database\n```\n\n## Tech Stack\n\n- **Web**: [TanStack Start](https://tanstack.com/start) + [Cloudflare Workers](https://workers.cloudflare.com/) + [D1](https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/) (SQLite)\n- **ORM**: [Drizzle](https://orm.drizzle.team/)\n- **Auth**: [BetterAuth](https://better-auth.com/) (GitHub OAuth + device flow)\n- **Styling**: [Tailwind CSS v4](https://tailwindcss.com/) + [shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com/)\n- **CLI**: [Commander](https://github.com/tj/commander.js)\n- **Quality**: [oxlint](https://oxc.rs/) + [oxfmt](https://oxc.rs/) + [tsgo](https://github.com/nicolo-ribaudo/tsgo)\n\n## Contributing\n\nWe welcome contributions! Please:\n\n1. Fork the repo and create a branch\n2. Make your changes\n3. Run `bun run format` and `bun run check`\n4. Open a PR\n\n## Acknowledgments\n\nAgentLogs was inspired by and builds on ideas from:\n\n- [Amp Threads](https://ampcode.com/) — team observability for AI coding agents\n- [Yaplog](https://yaplog.dev/), [Pi session sharing](https://pi.dev), [OpenCode session sharing](https://opencode.ai) — public sharing of AI coding sessions\n\n## License\n\n[MIT](LICENSE)\n"" + "text": "[execute_command for 'cat /Users/bee/.cline/data/tasks/1770913324799/api_conversation_history.json | jq '.[2].content[0].text' 2>/dev/null | head -20'] Result: Command executed successfully (exit code 0). (openssl rand -base64 32)\n# BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost:8787\n# WEB_URL=http://localhost:8787\n\n# Initialize database\nbun db:migrate\n\n# Start\nbun dev\n```\n\nOpen http://localhost:8787\n\nPoint the CLI at your instance:\n\n```bash\nnpx agentlogs login localhost:8787\n```\n\n### Deploy to Cloudflare\n\n```bash\ncd packages/server\n\n# Create D1 database\nwrangler d1 create agentlogs\n\n# Run remote migrations\nbun db:migrate:remote\n\n# Set secrets\nwrangler secret put GITHUB_CLIENT_ID\nwrangler secret put GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET\nwrangler secret put BETTER_AUTH_SECRET\n\n# Deploy\nbun run deploy\n```\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```\npackages/\n├── cli/ — CLI tool (npx agentlogs)\n├── web/ — Web app (TanStack Start + Cloudflare Workers + D1)\n├── shared/ — Shared types, schemas, transcript parsing, secret redaction\n├── pi/ — Pi extension (@agentlogs/pi)\n├── opencode/ — OpenCode plugin (@agentlogs/opencode)\n└── e2e/ — End-to-end tests\ndocs/ — Documentation (Mintlify)\n```\n\n## Development\n\n```bash\n# Start the web app\nbun dev\n\n# Run CLI\nbun agentlogs\n\n# Type check, lint, format\nbun run check\n\n# Format code\nbun run format\n\n# Run e2e tests\nbun run test:e2e\n\n# Database commands\nbun db:migrate # Run migrations\nbun db:generate # Generate migrations from schema changes\nbun db:studio # Open Drizzle Studio\nbun db:reset # Reset local database\n```\n\n## Tech Stack\n\n- **Web**: [TanStack Start](https://tanstack.com/start) + [Cloudflare Workers](https://workers.cloudflare.com/) + [D1](https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/) (SQLite)\n- **ORM**: [Drizzle](https://orm.drizzle.team/)\n- **Auth**: [BetterAuth](https://better-auth.com/) (GitHub OAuth + device flow)\n- **Styling**: [Tailwind CSS v4](https://tailwindcss.com/) + [shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com/)\n- **CLI**: [Commander](https://github.com/tj/commander.js)\n- **Quality**: [oxlint](https://oxc.rs/) + [oxfmt](https://oxc.rs/) + [tsgo](https://github.com/nicolo-ribaudo/tsgo)\n\n## Contributing\n\nWe welcome contributions!
